delta.description: With_skill outputs demonstrate perfect 100% pass rate across all evaluations (27/27 assertions passed), while without_skill outputs show 44.4% pass rate (12/27 assertions passed). The skill provides comprehensive technical depth with specific commands, explicit prioritization of troubleshooting steps, detailed configuration parameters (surge settings, PDB adjustments), and Autopilot-specific constraints. Without_skill outputs offer basic guidance but lack specificity, miss critical diagnostic commands, omit certain cause categories (webhooks), and provide incomplete surge/PDB configuration examples.
